coding_rationale: Raw signal detection; stimulus-driven accuracy task; no cognitive mediation or emotional interpretation
Simple body awareness reporting without interpretation; near-zero alexithymia association; passive noticing
Questionnaire items assess confusion about single-modality body signals without cross-modal or emotional integration components; unidimensional construct
Scale items assess reactivity intensity on a single arousal dimension; no items reference integration across body regions or emotional contexts
Eating disorder body monitoring; single-dimension distress tracking without integration
Metacognitive calibration of body signal accuracy across domains; multi-dimensional self-assessment
Multi-dimensional integrative awareness: noticing + emotional awareness + self-regulation + trusting
Multi-contextual body-cognition coupling integrated with daily functioning
